svg.title: WR250R reference (Web Cam 81-651)
svg.desc: Overlap-centered SVAJ stack with hard cam-card events, lift thresholds, confidence bands, and source-blind profile quality.
svg.text: Primary engineering view: 0-360 crank-degree overlap window; 180 = TDC overlap
model-derived; replace with measured lift data
- Intake: Opening and closing flanks are nearly
mirror-symmetric; the cam card does not
Peak lift 0.360 in, cold lash 0.006/0.008 in
- Dashed markers are hard @0.050 in crossings
Projection: cam_analyzer.visualization_projection.v1. Renderer draws only sampled boundary answers and does not recompute source facts.
